name: an-dr-code-analysis
description: Static code analysis: call graphs, file dependencies, and component dependencies.

an-dr-code-analysis.analysis.callGraph.d.description: Default call graph depth in both directions.

an-dr-code-analysis.analysis.callGraph.h.description: Hide stdlib/external symbols in call graph.

an-dr-code-analysis.analysis.componentDe.description: Hide external packages in component graph.

an-dr-code-analysis.analysis.maxDepth.description: Hard cap on depth in sidebar. Expanded view uses 8.

an-dr-code-analysis.tools.clangdPath.description: Override clangd binary path. Empty = auto-detect from PATH.

an-dr-code-analysis.tools.rustAnalyzerPa.description: Override rust-analyzer binary path. Empty = auto-detect.

an-dr-code-analysis.tools.ctagsPath.description: Override ctags binary path. Empty = auto-detect.

an-dr-code-analysis.tools.cscopePath.description: Override cscope binary path. Empty = auto-detect.

an-dr-code-analysis.tools.compileCommand.description: Override compile_commands.json path. Empty = search standard locations.

an-dr-code-analysis.tools.fallbackTool.description: Force a specific fallback tool instead of auto-selection.

an-dr-code-analysis.clangd.fallbackFlags.description: Extra compiler flags passed to clangd when compile_commands.json is missing.

an-dr-code-analysis.clangd.warnOnMissing.description: Show warning when compile_commands.json is not found.

an-dr-code-analysis.clangd.autoOfferReco.description: Offer recovery actions when clangd fails.

an-dr-code-analysis.ai.enabled.description: Enable AI fallback when all local tools fail. Requires companion extension.

an-dr-code-analysis.ai.requireConfirmati.description: Show confirmation dialog before sending code to AI for analysis.

an-dr-code-analysis.ai.extensionId.description: VS Code extension ID of the AI companion extension.

an-dr-code-analysis.ui.showConfidenceBad.description: Show tool confidence badge below graph.

an-dr-code-analysis.ui.nodeLabel.maxLeng.description: Max node label characters in sidebar graph.
Max node label characters in expanded graph.

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && vsce package --no-dependencies && code --install-extension an-dr-code-analysis-0.1.0.vsix
